transcript.text:
Is it coming out now?
[Hungry]
[Dumplings will be out soon~]
Our aunt went to China to learn the traditional ways of making a dumpling
This has been passed down for 200 years 200 years!?
200 years of tradition?
[Michelin Guide for 4 years in a row]
[A dumplings restaurants with 200 years of tradition]
[Feasting]
[She's a dumpling thief today]
Can I order 1 more batch?
[Stacking boxes]
[I'm at 12 baskets already?]
No, I can't do 100
Hello everyone~
I heard that there's a very famous dumpling restaurant here, so I am here to try it

This place has been popular for a while now
And I've been wanting to come try it
I'm so excited
[Goo Bok Mandu located at Sookdae Entrance]
There are 4 kinds total?
Then 2 baskets each, please
[Whole-shrimp dumplings]
[Xiao Long Bao (Soup Dumplings)]
Thank you
[Xiao Long Bao filled with soup]
[Whole-shrimp packed dumplings]
That looks scrumptious
This place is called Goo Bok Dumplings
They are very well known for their dumplings
They have 4 different flavors and I ordered 2 baskets of each
[Next up is the Goo Bok Traditional Dumplings]

[Their secret flour water]
[Boil down until there's no more liquid]
[AKA Water-Fried Dumplings!]
[Snowflake-shaped dumplings]
Thank you
This way, please
They look amazing
Do you guys know what this is?
I've never had anything like this before
Water-fried?
I've seen it in recipe books, but I never had it
The bottom is very crispy
And the top is a steamed dumpling
This is what they're most popular for
This is the Xiao Long Bao
It's filled with meat and soup

This is shrimp
Oh this one is Kimchi and this one is pork
[Round 1] [2 baskets each totaling up to 48 pieces of dumplings]
Bon appetit
I'll try this first
It has a crispy side
It's very nutty They're almost like chips
[Now for a whole bite]
Delicious It's very soft
It melts right away
The bottom is crispy and the top is steamed
This
Soup dumplings Xiao Long Bao
Splashy
[Drip drip]
This is just what I like

That's so good
With the spoon
You're supposed to do this
Get the soup in the spoon
The soup is really amazing
The shrimp dumpling is pretty big
This will be hard to eat in 1 bite
[It's possible for Tzuyang]
Can't compare it with the shrimp dumplings from the convenience store
Well I mean, duh
[Zoning out]
I was forgetting about this
This one didn't explode yet
So good
It looks so good
The soup is really flavorful

It's full of juice
Can I order 1 basket each?
Can I please have 1 basket of each flavor?
[Ordered additional baskets for each flavor]
They're all good overall
The shrimp and the xiao long bao are my personal favorite
Should I change it? Should I change the order?
Just a sec
[Changing her order to 2 Xiao Long Bao orders and 2 Shrimp orders]
[Excited]
[Let's make room for the next order]
[4 steamers]
Did she order 3 of each flavor?
She ordered 8 earlier and ordered 4 more So it's 12 baskets total
[Eating 12 baskets of dumplings in 1 sitting!?]
[Eating 12 baskets of dumplings in 1 sitting..]

[8 baskets down]
[Here comes 4 more]
[When will it come out?]
Is it coming out now?
[12 steamers of dumplings total]
That looks good
They said to make a hole in these
If not, the soup will be too hot
I'll experiment on how hot it is
Will I be okay?
[Not okay]
That was perfect
It was fine I didn't get burned
That was really good
It tastes best when it's warm
Shrimp dumplings

It's so tasty
This one seems hotter
It's good because it's warm
Look at that juice
[1 bite of the dumpling]
[And drink its juice]
[1 last bite?]
[Mukbang is not over]
A new basket of shrimp dumplings
Another one
I spilled some juice
They're nice and warm
They go really well with coke
[1 sip of Coca Cola]
[Start a new basket]
[A perfect combination with dumplings and coca cola]

[Please, single-file line]
[As if it's her first bite]
I didn't leave out the shrimp on purpose as I was eating
But I was eating the other stuff in there
And there were lots of other ingredients in there with great texture
It tastes great even without the shrimp
[1 bite of the shrimp dumpling]
[Last piece of shrimp]
[Can't waste the tail]
My final dumpling [She ate 72 total]
[Squirts soup]
[Oops]
It got on the camera
It's a brand new camera...
It won't wipe too well
It's not working

What should I do?
It's because it's grease
It just hardened
[I'm sorry~]
That's it
That was a great meal
[12 steamers tower]
Anyways, Thanks everyone~
Subtitles by Hyun Choi antharoni@gmail.com
